scripts.build: npm run build:protocol && npm run build:crypto && npm run sim:build && npm run build:app && npm run build:server
scripts.build:windows: powershell -Command "if (Get-Command dotnet -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { $s=dotnet --list-sdks; if ([string]::IsNullOrWhiteSpace(($s | Out-String))) { Write-Output 'dotnet-sdk-missing' } else { dotnet publish apps/windows -c Release -o artifacts/windows } } else { Write-Output 'dotnet-sdk-missing' }"
scripts.build:android: powershell -Command "if (Get-Command gradle -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue) { Push-Location apps/android; gradle assembleRelease; Pop-Location } else { Write-Output 'gradle-missing' }"
scripts.ci:validate: npm run bootstrap && npm run build && npm run validate:protocol && npm run sim:test && npm run sim:test:network && npm run app:test
